chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-69 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of bail application 22-04-2024 Mr. Muhammad Hassan Pathan (Lala Hassan Pathan), Advocate for applicants. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for the applicants after arguing the matter at some length does not press this bail application and seeks directions for the trial Court to expedite the trial. Learned Additional P.G has recorded no objection to it. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the trial Court is directed to examine complainant and injured within two months, after which, in any case the applicants would be at liberty to file fresh bail application before the trial Court for the same relief for fresh consideration, which shall be decided on its own merits, independent of the previous orders. JUDGE Ahmad
